title: Incorrect handling of `x` in if blocks (`if (x) else` ) ?

features.name: if_else with x condition
features.description: Code should include an if-else statement where the condition evaluates to x (unknown value), which should be treated as false in simulation

features.name: inversion of x propagating x
features.description: Code should include inversion of a signal initialized with x, where ~x should propagate x but causes incorrect if-condition evaluation

features.name: nonblocking assignment in if_else with x
features.description: Code should include a nonblocking assignment inside an if-else where the condition involves x, causing incorrect value assignment
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (condition) begin
    end else begin
        out <= 1'b1;
    end
end
